title: onobrychis peduncularis
intro: Onobrychis peduncularis, also known as narrowleaf bird's-foot trefoil, is a legume plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Onobrychis peduncularis can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat a range of ailments.
